home.heroTitle: Which tool do you need today?
home.footerDesc: A collection of free online tools to make your daily life easier.

unit.title: Unit Converters Collection
unit.description: Convert all units instantly in one place including length, weight, currency, temperature, and area. We provide real-time currency info and accurate conversion formulas.

finance.title: Life & Finance Calculators
finance.description: Try essential financial calculators for loan interest, net salary, severance pay, and minimum wage. Reflects accurate legal formulas and latest data.

text.title: Text Conversion & Analysis Tools
text.description: Useful tools for text editing like word counters, case converters, and Unicode converters. Simply copy and paste to use.

dev.title: Essential Online Tools for Developers
dev.description: Maximize productivity with professional tools like JSON formatters, Base64 encoders, hash generators, and URL encoders directly in your browser.

utility.title: Convenient Life Utility Tools
utility.description: A collection of various utility tools that solve daily hassles, such as QR code generators, barcode generation, password creation, and world clocks.

health.title: Health & Body Index Calculators
health.description: Check your health status with professional body index calculators like BMI, BMR, and biorhythms.

games.title: Mini Games Collection
games.description: Play addictive mini-games like Suika Game, 2048, Sudoku, and Snake instantly without any installation.

fun.title: Fun Fortune & Psychology Tests
fun.description: Full of fun content to see your luck and psychology, from MBTI tests and daily horoscopes to tarot cards!

trivia.title: Simple Trivia & Quizzes
trivia.description: A collection of quizzes like initial sound games and general knowledge questions to build knowledge while having fun.

category.whyUse: Why use {name} tools on Tool Hive?
category.whyUseDesc: Tool Hive {name} tools run instantly in your web browser without complex installations or annoying ads. Your valuable data is not stored on servers, but processed entirely within your browser for complete privacy and security.
